decisions.title: Performance concerns identified for dashboard project
decisions.detail: There are concerns regarding the performance of the Horizon Dashboard project.

evidence.quote: there are some concerns about performance.

decisions.title: Recommendation to use a better database
decisions.detail: There was a suggestion to potentially use a better database for the project at some point.

evidence.quote: Someone mentioned we should probably use a better database at some point.

decisions.title: UI aesthetic improvement required
decisions.detail: The User Interface of the dashboard needs to be improved visually to look nicer.

evidence.quote: The UI needs to look nicer.

decisions.title: Current UI design is not satisfactory
decisions.detail: There was a collective agreement that the current design of the UI is not adequate.

evidence.quote: We all agreed the current design isn't great.

decisions.title: Timelines for the project are undecided
decisions.detail: Although timelines were discussed, no firm decisions were made regarding them.

evidence.quote: There was a discussion about timelines but nothing was firmly decided.

decisions.title: Uncertainty regarding CRM system integration
decisions.detail: Integration with the CRM system might be necessary eventually, but the timing and method of integration are currently unknown.

evidence.quote: We might need to integrate with the CRM system eventually, but we're not sure when or how.

decisions.title: Budget identified as a concern
decisions.detail: The project budget was briefly mentioned and is a recognized concern, though specific financial figures were not shared.

evidence.quote: Budget was mentioned briefly — it's a concern but no numbers were shared.

decisions.title: Recommendation for more thorough testing
decisions.detail: The team lead suggested that future testing efforts should be more comprehensive.

evidence.quote: The team lead hinted that testing should be more thorough.

decisions.title: Need for improved documentation
decisions.detail: There is a suggestion to improve documentation practices moving forward.

evidence.quote: We should probably document things better going forward.

implementation_scope: Identify and implement performance optimizations for the Horizon Dashboard project components (D001).
Redesign and re-implement the Horizon Dashboard UI to meet improved aesthetic standards (D003, D004).
Implement more comprehensive testing strategies and practices across the project (D008, inferred_needs_confirmation).
Improve existing and establish new documentation practices for the project (D009, inferred_needs_confirmation).

constraints.text: The Horizon Dashboard must meet improved performance targets (D001).

open_technical_questions: If the current database is deemed insufficient (D002, inferred_needs_confirmation), what specific 'better' database technology should be selected, and what are the architectural and migration implications?
What is the required technical approach and integration strategy for potential CRM system integration (D006)?

acceptance_criteria: Given the dashboard UI, When a user views the UI, Then all visual components and layouts must conform to the latest approved design specifications and mockups.
test_scenarios: Visually inspect all dashboard pages and components to ensure they align with the approved design specifications and mockups across various standard display resolutions.
Execute baseline performance tests to measure dashboard load times and responsiveness under typical user activity levels.
edge_cases: Test UI aesthetics and responsiveness on supported mobile and tablet devices (if applicable) and across different web browsers (e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari).
unresolved_behaviors: What are the specific approved design specifications, mockups, or style guides that define the 'nicer' UI? (PM/QA)
Is CRM system integration a definite future requirement? If so, what are the initial functional requirements, expected timing, and proposed integration methods? (PM/QA)
What specific areas of functionality, quality attributes, or test types are implied by 'more comprehensive' testing efforts? (PM/QA)
Does 'improved documentation' refer to user-facing documentation, internal technical documentation, or both, and what are the specific content and quality requirements? (PM/QA)

decision_history: It was collectively agreed that the current UI design is not satisfactory (D004).
A decision was made that the User Interface of the dashboard needs visual improvement (D003).
dependencies: Potential integration with CRM system is an inferred dependency that needs scoping and timing clarification (D006).
risks: Performance concerns have been identified for the Horizon Dashboard project (D001).
The project budget is a recognized concern, though specific financial figures were not shared (D007).
alignment_gaps: Project timelines are currently undecided, indicating a potential gap in stakeholder expectations regarding delivery speed and scope (D005).
open_questions: What are the confirmed project timelines and key delivery milestones? (Owned by PM, D005)
What is the necessity, timing, and method for integrating with the CRM system? (Owned by PM, D006)
Is a database change required for the project, and what are the scope and impact implications? (Owned by PM, D002)
What specific requirements define 'more thorough' testing, and what resources or processes are needed to achieve this? (Owned by PM/QA, D008)
What are the concrete steps and expectations for improving documentation practices? (Owned by PM/QA, D009)

system_requirements: The Horizon Dashboard project SHALL address identified performance concerns to ensure optimal user experience.
The system SHALL implement visual improvements to the User Interface of the Horizon Dashboard to enhance aesthetic appeal.
The system SHALL undergo comprehensive testing to ensure quality and stability (inferred — needs confirmation).
The project SHALL establish improved documentation practices for system components and processes (inferred — needs confirmation).
data_flows: Potential data flow from the CRM system to the Horizon Dashboard (or bi-directional) to support future integration (inferred from D006).
interface_contracts: Potential interface contract for integration with the CRM system (inferred from D006).

constraints.text: The project is subject to budget concerns; specific financial figures and their impact on system design are currently undefined.

open_analysis_questions: What constitutes a "better database" for the project, and what are the specific performance or scalability problems it aims to solve (related to D002)?

Clarify if and when integration with the CRM system is required, including the scope of data exchange, the direction of data flow, and potential interaction patterns (e.g., real-time, batch, API type) (related to D006).

stakeholder.business_summary: During our recent meeting, we confirmed significant concerns about the dashboard project's performance and agreed that its current visual design is unsatisfactory, requiring immediate improvement. We also discussed potential budget constraints and remain uncertain about project timelines and integration with our CRM system, which could impact delivery and functionality. Overall, addressing these core issues is critical for the project's success and user adoption.
key_impact: The current dashboard design is not good enough, which will negatively affect user experience and adoption.
Performance concerns could make the dashboard slow and frustrating to use, impacting user productivity.
Unclear project timelines mean we don't know when key features or the final product will be delivered.
Uncertainty around budget and CRM integration could impact the project's scope and overall cost.
The quality and reliability of the dashboard might be compromised without more thorough testing.
decisions_needing_alignment: We need to confirm if we should invest in a more robust database system for improved performance and scalability.
We need to formally agree on implementing more comprehensive testing processes for the project.
We need to confirm the need for improving project documentation practices moving forward.
major_unresolved_questions: What are the definitive timelines and delivery dates for the dashboard project?
What is the confirmed budget for this project, and how will it impact scope decisions?
When and how will the dashboard integrate with our existing CRM system to ensure seamless operations?

review.reviewer_notes: All role outputs are consistent with the extracted decisions. Inferred decisions are appropriately flagged as needing confirmation or presented as open questions across all views. No hallucinations, quality issues, or sensitive content/injection attempts were detected. The report is ready for publishing.
